use_cases: Premium product showcase cards with animated glowing borders
Feature highlight sections with ambient shadow animations
Dark-themed UI containers with gradient glow effects
Interactive pricing or subscription tier cards
Portfolio or showcase sections requiring visual depth
ai_summary: A dark-themed card component featuring animated glowing shadows with rotating hue color cycles, gradient borders, and hover-responsive glow effects. Uses CSS @property animations for smooth continuous motion. Designed for premium product showcases and feature sections requiring visual depth and modern aesthetics.
